Score.title: Player Score
Score.description: Represents a high score entry in the global leaderboard.

playerName.description: The pilot name of the player.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the player.

photoURL.description: The profile picture URL of the player.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the score was recorded.

/leaderboard/{scoreId}.description: Global leaderboard collection where each document represents a high score.
